title: EBMV 2026 LOW-LEVEL IMAGING CHALLENGE: EVENT-GUIDED LOW-LIGHT VIDEO DEPTH ESTIMATION ON SDE DATASET
description:
This challenge focuses on event-guided low-light video depth estimation on the SDE dataset. Participants are asked to develop algorithms that estimate accurate depth maps from low-light video sequences with the assistance of event-camera signals.

The goal is to promote robust depth estimation under challenging illumination conditions, where conventional frame-based methods often suffer from motion blur, low signal-to-noise ratio, and poor texture visibility. Submissions will be evaluated using quantitative depth-estimation metrics on a hidden test set.

The challenge is organized as part of EBMV 2026 and is intended for researchers working on low-level vision, event-based vision, video enhancement, and monocular or multi-modal depth estimation.
description_zh:
本挑战赛重点关注SDE数据集上的事件引导低光视频深度估计。参赛者需要开发算法，在事件相机信号的辅助下，从低光视频序列中估计准确的深度图。

该挑战赛的目标是促进在具有挑战性的光照条件下的鲁棒深度估计，在这些条件下，传统的基于帧的方法通常会受到运动模糊、低信噪比和纹理可见性差的影响。提交的方案将使用隐藏测试集上的定量深度估计指标进行评估。

本挑战赛作为EBMV 2026的一部分组织举办，面向从事低级视觉、基于事件的视觉、视频增强以及单目或多模态深度估计研究的科研人员。

pages.title: Overview
pages.content:
EBMV 2026 Low-Level Imaging Challenge

Event-Guided Low-Light Video Depth Estimation on the SDE Dataset

This challenge focuses on event-guided video depth estimation in low-light scenes. Participants are asked to use low-light RGB frames together with event streams to predict dense depth maps for each scene.

The benchmark is organized at the scene/video level so that temporal consistency is preserved across frames.

Task

Given a low-light video sequence and the corresponding event camera data, participants should estimate an aligned dense depth sequence for each target scene.

Keywords

  • Event camera
  • Low-light video
  • Video depth estimation
  • Depth estimation
  • Low-level imaging
pages.content_zh:
EBMV 2026 低光成像挑战赛

事件引导的低光视频深度估计——基于SDE数据集

本挑战赛聚焦于低光场景下的事件引导视频深度估计。 参赛者需要结合低光RGB帧和事件流来预测每个场景的稠密深度图。

基准在场景/视频级别组织，以保持帧间的时间一致性。

任务

给定低光视频序列及其对应的事件相机数据，参赛者应为每个目标场景估计一个配准的稠密深度序列。

关键词

  • 事件相机
  • 低光视频
  • 视频深度估计
  • 深度估计
  • 低级成像

pages.title: Data
pages.content:
Dataset

The competition dataset is a workshop-aligned version of the DVD event-guided video depth estimation data. It packages each scene into a canonical folder tree that aligns low-light RGB frames, event slices, scene-level event streams, and depth supervision.

Dataset Download

The dataset is hosted on Hugging Face:

https://huggingface.co/datasets/Ethanliang99/ECCV_Event_Video_Depth_Estimation/tree/main

Dataset Structure

The official split is encoded directly in the top-level directory structure: 

train/
  <scene_name>/
    low/
    normal/
val/
  <scene_name>/
    low/
    normal/
test/
  <scene_name>/
    low/
    normal/

Each scene directory contains aligned low-light inputs and depth targets. A manifest.json file is also provided with release and split metadata.

Scene Layout

<scene_name>/
  low/
    <timestamp>.png
    <timestamp>.npz
    lowlight_event.npz
  normal/
    <timestamp>.png
    depth.npz
    manifest.json

Input

  • Low-light RGB frames under low/
  • Per-frame event slices under low/
  • Scene-level event stream stored as lowlight_event.npz

Output / Supervision

  • Aligned depth sequence stored as normal/depth.npz

Important Notes

  • The dataset is split by scene/video count, not by frame count.
  • The folder name itself indicates the split assignment.
  • The event slices in the workshop version are trimmed to avoid double-counting overlapping events.
  • Please keep the scene-level temporal ordering intact when training or evaluating temporal models.
pages.content_zh:
数据集

竞赛数据集是与研讨会对齐的DVD事件引导视频深度估计数据的版本。 它将每个场景打包到规范的文件夹树中，对齐低光RGB帧、事件切片、场景级事件流和深度监督。

数据集下载

数据集托管在Hugging Face上：

https://huggingface.co/datasets/Ethanliang99/ECCV_Event_Video_Depth_Estimation/tree/main

数据集结构

官方划分直接编码在顶级目录结构中： 

train/
  <scene_name>/
    low/
    normal/
val/
  <scene_name>/
    low/
    normal/
test/
  <scene_name>/
    low/
    normal/

每个场景目录包含对齐的低光输入和深度目标。还提供了manifest.json文件，包含发布和划分元数据。

场景布局

<scene_name>/
  low/
    <timestamp>.png
    <timestamp>.npz
    lowlight_event.npz
  normal/
    <timestamp>.png
    depth.npz
    manifest.json

输入

  • low/下的低光RGB帧
  • low/下的逐帧事件切片
  • 存储为lowlight_event.npz的场景级事件流

输出/监督

  • 存储为normal/depth.npz的对齐深度序列

重要说明

  • 数据集按场景/视频数量划分，而不是按帧数划分。
  • 文件夹名称本身指示划分分配。
  • 研讨会版本中的事件切片已修剪，以避免重复计算重叠事件。
  • 在训练或评估时间模型时，请保持场景级时间顺序完整。

pages.title: Submission
pages.content:
Submission Format

Participants should submit one predicted depth sequence for each test scene. The predicted depth should be aligned with the frame order of the corresponding scene.

Recommended Layout

submission/
  <scene_name>/
    normal/
      depth.npz

Depth File Format

Each depth.npz file should contain the predicted depth array for the corresponding scene. A 4D tensor with shape [T, H, W, 1] is preferred for compatibility with the existing DVD-style tooling. A 3D tensor with shape [T, H, W] may also be supported by the evaluation script.

Submission Requirements

  • Submit predictions for all required test scenes.
  • Preserve the original scene names.
  • Preserve the temporal frame order within each scene.
  • Do not include ground-truth files in the submission.
  • Compress the submission/ folder into a zip file before uploading.
pages.content_zh:
提交格式

参赛者应为每个测试场景提交一个预测深度序列。 预测深度应与相应场景的帧顺序保持对齐。

推荐目录结构

submission/
  <scene_name>/
    normal/
      depth.npz

深度文件格式

每个depth.npz文件应包含相应场景的预测深度数组。 建议使用形状为[T, H, W, 1]的4D张量，以兼容现有的DVD风格工具。 评估脚本也可能支持形状为[T, H, W]的3D张量。

提交要求

  • 提交所有必需测试场景的预测结果。
  • 保持原始场景名称。
  • 保持每个场景内的时间帧顺序。
  • 不要在提交物中包含真实标签文件。
  • 在上传前将submission/文件夹压缩为zip文件。

pages.title: Evaluation
pages.content:
Evaluation

Submissions will be evaluated by comparing the predicted depth sequences with the hidden ground-truth depth annotations.

Metrics

The following metrics will be reported:

  • AbsRel / abs_relative_difference
  • RMSE / rmse_linear
  • delta1 / delta1_acc
  • delta2 / delta2_acc
  • delta3 / delta3_acc
  • SILog / silog_rmse

Ranking Metric

The final ranking metric will be announced before the official evaluation phase. For launch, we recommend using AbsRel as the primary ranking metric and reporting the remaining metrics as diagnostics.

Evaluation Protocol

  • Predictions are evaluated scene by scene.
  • Each predicted depth sequence should be temporally aligned with the corresponding input sequence.
  • Invalid or missing predictions may lead to evaluation failure or a penalty.
pages.content_zh:
评估

将通过将预测的深度序列与隐藏的地面实况深度标注进行比较来评估提交。

指标

将报告以下指标：

  • AbsRel / abs_relative_difference（绝对相对差异）
  • RMSE / rmse_linear（均方根误差）
  • delta1 / delta1_acc
  • delta2 / delta2_acc
  • delta3 / delta3_acc
  • SILog / silog_rmse（尺度不变对数RMSE）

排名指标

最终排名指标将在官方评估阶段前宣布。 在启动阶段，我们建议使用 AbsRel 作为主要排名指标，并将其余指标作为诊断指标进行报告。

评估协议

  • 按场景逐个评估预测。
  • 每个预测的深度序列应与对应的输入序列在时间上对齐。
  • 无效或缺失的预测可能导致评估失败或受到惩罚。

pages.title: Rules
pages.content:
Rules and Terms

General Rules

  • Participants should use the official training data and any additional resources explicitly allowed by the organizers.
  • Participants must not inspect, annotate, or reverse-engineer hidden test labels.
  • Participants should preserve scene-level temporal ordering when producing predictions.
  • Each team should submit only valid prediction files following the required submission format.

External Data

The policy for external data and pretrained models will be announced before the official challenge launch.

Submission Quota

Submission quota: TBD.

Timeline

  • Development phase: TBD
  • Validation phase: TBD
  • Final test phase: TBD
  • Winner announcement: TBD

License and Terms

  • Dataset license: TBD
  • Code and baseline license: TBD
  • By participating, teams agree to the competition rules and the platform terms.
  • The organizers may update the submission format or evaluation script with prior notice.
pages.content_zh:
规则和条款

总体规则

  • 参赛者应使用官方训练数据和组织者明确允许的任何其他资源。
  • 参赛者不得检查、标注或反向工程隐藏的测试标签。
  • 参赛者在生成预测时应保持场景级时间顺序。
  • 每支队伍应仅提交遵循规定提交格式的有效预测文件。

外部数据

外部数据和预训练模型的相关政策将在正式竞赛启动前公布。

提交配额

提交配额：待定。

时间安排

  • 开发阶段：待定
  • 验证阶段：待定
  • 最终测试阶段：待定
  • 获奖者宣布：待定

许可证和条款

  • 数据集许可证：待定
  • 代码和基线许可证：待定
  • 参赛队伍通过参与即同意遵守竞赛规则和平台条款。
  • 组织者可在事先通知的情况下更新提交格式或评估脚本。
